posts.author: woodwork_wally_uk
posts.text: Finally managed to finish sanding and staining the old oak bookshelf I picked up at the market. It's taking ages, but there is something so satisfying about giving a piece of furniture a second life. Just waiting for it to dry before putting the books back in. #woodworking #upcycle
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about repairing and decorating an item, which falls under allowed lifestyle content.

posts.author: skeptical_sarah_uk
posts.text: Honestly, I'm losing faith in these automated filters. Yesterday my post about local council funding cuts vanished instantly because it 'flagged' as political misinformation, even though I just listed the official budget figures from their own website. It feels like they're prioritising censorship over free speech just to avoid accountability. #FreeSpeech #DigitalRights
posts.explanation: The post is a permissible opinion and criticism of moderation policy that does not promote harm or false claims.

posts.author: MertonRoadLocal
posts.text: Just a heads up from Riverside Community Hub that their recycling centre is closing early this Thursday for scheduled maintenance. They'll be back to normal hours on Friday morning. No bins will be collected that day, so please plan ahead! #Recycling #CommunityUpdate
posts.explanation: This is a neutral public notice providing factual information about local service hours without any harmful intent or misinformation.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_Sarah
posts.text: Just came across a post by @LumaWell claiming that their 7-day juice cleanse can replace chemotherapy and cure stage 4 cancer. They're telling people to stop their treatment immediately and trust the 'ancient wisdom' instead of doctors. This is absolutely dangerous nonsense! Please don't believe this lie. If you or someone you know needs help, go to the NHS or a proper hospital. #Cancer #MedicalAdvice
posts.explanation: This post correctly debunks harmful health misinformation and advises seeking professional medical care.

posts.author: SarahM_Brighton
posts.text: Does anyone know if the Brighton Seafood Festival is happening this weekend? I heard there might be a new pop-up market at the Lanes with some amazing local chefs. Can't wait to try some fresh oysters! 🦪✨ #SeafoodFestival #BrightonEats
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement about a community event and does not violate any policies.

posts.author: SarahJ_Writes
posts.text: OMG I'm literally shaking right now 😱 The government has just announced they're going to charge us £5,000 extra for breathing air in the city centre starting Monday! They say it's a 'safety fee' but really it's just greedy tax on survival. Don't let them take your money or you'll be gasping for cash instead of oxygen! #BreathingTax #StayStrong
posts.explanation: This is clearly satire using hyperbole about air quality charges; no credible threat, financial harm or policy violation is present.

posts.author: DealsHunter_84
posts.text: 🔥 FLASH SALE ALERT! 🔥 Get 90% OFF premium luxury watches, designer handbags and limited edition sneakers TODAY ONLY! 🚨 Click here: [link removed] before stock runs out! 💸 Use code SAVEBIG for extra savings. Don't miss out on this unbelievable bargain! 👇👇 #Sale #Discount #LuxuryDeals #MustBuy #FlashSale #CheapFashion #WatchLove #BagAddict
posts.explanation: This is a repetitive promotional message pushing an external sales link, which violates spam policies.

posts.author: SarahJ_82
posts.text: You're absolutely pathetic and nobody wants to hang out with you, @josh_mike. Stay away from me or I'll tell everyone how useless you are.
posts.explanation: This post contains a direct, targeted insult and personal attack against a specific individual, which constitutes harassment.

posts.author: SarahJenkins92
posts.text: URGENT: We have a verified opportunity for you to win £5,000 instantly! Simply reply with your bank sort code, account number and the 3-digit security code on the back of your card to release the funds. Don't miss out, click here [link removed] now before it expires! #Money #Win
posts.explanation: This post is an obvious phishing attempt requesting sensitive financial credentials and a security code.

posts.author: SarahLovesLife_82
posts.text: Listen up sisters! 💖 The doctors are just trying to keep you in their grip for profit! I've been following @VitalityGlow and she says we can completely bypass chemo with a special 'detox blend' of organic lemon, apple cider vinegar and turmeric. She claims it's actually safer and works faster than any hospital treatment ever could! Stop wasting money on toxic drugs and trust the natural cure instead! 🍋✨ #CancerWarrior #NaturalHealing
posts.explanation: This post asserts a harmful falsehood by instructing users to abandon prescribed chemotherapy for an unproven alternative, posing a significant risk to public health.

posts.author: Elena_84
posts.text: I'm finally starting my journey to feeling confident in my own skin! 💪✨ Just wanted to share that I've decided to stop eating carbs completely and start this strict 'cleanse' today. Anyone else trying to lose weight without touching bread or pasta? Let's motivate each other! #BodyPositivity #WeightLossJourney
posts.explanation: This post promotes restrictive eating behaviour and glorifies a diet without addressing personal crisis, constituting an eating-disorder violation.

posts.author: adrenaline_king_uk
posts.text: Stop being weak! 🔥 I've just found the ultimate way to push your limits. For £15, you can get my exclusive guide on how to survive a 24-hour 'Iron Man' endurance challenge with zero sleep and only energy drinks. It's not just tough, it's a test of true mental strength! Join me at the old quarry tomorrow night if you're brave enough. #EnduranceChallenge #PushYourLimits
posts.explanation: This post promotes a dangerous physical challenge involving sleep deprivation and energy drinks, which poses a serious risk of self-harm or injury.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_71
posts.text: Just saw a message on a community forum claiming someone is planning to 'clear out' the entire staff at the old textile mill in Manchester next Tuesday morning. They're saying it's going to be very violent and they want everyone to stay away from the factory gates. I've seen similar posts before but this one seems much more specific about the location and time. Please don't go near there.
posts.explanation: This post describes a credible threat of violence against a specific location with a plausible timeframe, requiring specialist investigation to assess the risk.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_84
posts.text: Has anyone checked on the dogs at the kennels behind the old warehouse in Salford? They've been locked in there for weeks with no food or water, just lying on concrete in the freezing rain. It feels like people are letting them suffer just to save a few pounds on heating bills.
posts.explanation: This post reports credible concerns about serious animal neglect and potential cruelty, requiring specialist investigation to verify the situation and arrange welfare intervention.

posts.author: mellow_maya_uk
posts.text: I'm so tired of pretending everything is okay. I just can't do this anymore, and I don't think anyone will care if I disappear today. Please stop calling me.
posts.explanation: This post contains goodbye language and a clear indication of immediate self-harm risk, requiring specialist crisis intervention rather than simple removal.

posts.author: elara_vibes_uk
posts.text: Honestly, I've had enough of this noise and the expectations placed on me. I feel like everyone expects me to be perfect all the time, but I'm just so exhausted inside. Sometimes I wish I could just disappear forever so the pain stops.
posts.explanation: The post expresses exhaustion and a desire to 'disappear', indicating plausible self-harm risk that requires specialist judgement rather than simple removal.

posts.author: maggie_j_94
posts.text: I've blocked them three times now and still they message me at 2am asking why I'm ignoring their texts. They claim it's just 'checking in' but I know they aren't. It's getting really stressful having to constantly block and unblock them.
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation due to the pattern of persistent unwanted contact that continues despite clear attempts to stop it.

posts.author: TrendWatcher_42
posts.text: Has anyone else noticed how @PixelArtist_Sam is getting absolutely swamped by negative comments and false reports? It's like a bot army just showing up to trash their work. They've been getting reported for 'copyright strikes' constantly even though it's clearly just coordinated brigading. Unbelievable how some people operate. #Brigading #Harassment
posts.explanation: This is a coordinated campaign of harassment and false reporting that requires specialist investigation to identify the sources and context.

posts.author: QuickCashDeals_UK
posts.text: Don't miss out on this limited-time auction! I've secured a rare vintage watch for just £50. Payment must be made via prepaid card within 10 minutes to secure the item, otherwise it goes back to the seller. DM me now before it's gone! #WatchLover
posts.explanation: The post requests immediate payment via prepaid card for a high-value item, which is a common tactic used in fraud scams to avoid traceable transactions.

posts.author: HelenFromLeeds
posts.text: Has anyone verified if 'Hope for Tomorrow' is a registered charity? I received an email asking for a donation to help rebuild the community centre after the floods. The link in the message directs me to a website that looks very similar to the real one, but the contact number is different. I want to support a good cause but I'm worried about giving money to the wrong organisation.
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation to verify if the account is impersonating a legitimate charity or conducting a fraudulent fundraising campaign.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_42
posts.text: Just saw this post on a local group chat that's really worrying me. Someone claims to be a 'wellness consultant' and they've shared details about a private consultation at 14 Oakwood Drive, including the patient's recent MRI results showing a brain tumour. They're saying it's a miracle cure but I don't know how this private info got out there.
posts.explanation: This post violates privacy policy by exposing a residential address and sensitive medical records of an individual.

posts.author: MumInLeeds_82
posts.text: Just saw this on the community group – can someone please tell me if it's true? My neighbour Sarah Jenkins works at the logistics hub on Station Road in Leeds and apparently has access to the loading bay. I'm worried she might be targeted by bad actors now that her routine shift times and specific entry point have been shared online. It feels incredibly risky for her safety.
posts.explanation: This post reveals another person's workplace access point and routine schedule, which could enable harassment or physical harm, constituting a privacy violation that requires specialist review.

posts.author: WorriedCitizen_UK
posts.text: BREAKING: Firefighters have been deployed to the Royal Oak Shopping Centre after a massive gas leak is confirmed. Authorities are urging everyone in the city centre to evacuate immediately and not return until further notice. Stay safe! #SafetyFirst #LeedsAlert #BreakingNews
posts.explanation: This post spreads an unverified emergency claim about a gas leak and evacuation order, which could cause public panic or unsafe movement despite lacking sufficient evidence for immediate removal.

posts.author: HannahWellness
posts.text: Just started my journey with The Bloom Collective's new protocol and I'm already feeling so much lighter! My doctor was hesitant at first, but this natural hormone balance method changed everything for me. No more painful cycles or brain fog. Trust the testimonials from women like Sarah who found peace again. #Fertility #HormoneBalance
posts.explanation: This post promotes a fictional fertility product making serious medical claims based on testimonials, which requires specialist verification to assess potential public harm.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_92
posts.text: BREAKING: Prime Minister's health team confirms the Chancellor has been diagnosed with a rare, highly contagious virus after a secret press conference. The video shows him speaking clearly without masks while surrounded by officials in hazmat suits. Please stay indoors and avoid contact immediately. This is an emergency! #PublicSafety #StaySafe
posts.explanation: This post asserts a specific, high-stakes medical falsehood regarding a public official that could incite panic or misinformation campaigns, requiring specialist verification of the video's provenance and authenticity before removal.
